v3.13 experimental binop fill/fill_left/fill_right modifiers: the vendored parser accepts them (BinModifier::fill_values) but the M2 planner ignores the field, so unmatched-side filling never happens and the result set is smaller than expected; not in the closed language-feature set (issue #64 plan v2 delta 4) — activation home M6-07 (operator/modifier matrix), which must also make the planner reject-or-implement fill_values explicitly

M2's metric-scoped model requires exactly one concrete metric name per selector (plan.rs::extract_name_and_matchers, docs/schemas.md section 2.1): matcher-only and regex-__name__ selectors are named-Unsupported by design; activation home M6-08 (selector completion alongside UTF-8 label names)

Expr::Unary over a vector/aggregate is named-Unsupported in M2 (plan.rs::plan_expr); the Delta-4 mapping excludes Unary from feature tracking as M2 core, so the residual surface is ledger-tracked; activation home M6-02 (elementwise math, which ports unary vector negation)

Expr::Unary over a vector/aggregate is named-Unsupported in M2 (plan.rs::plan_expr); the Delta-4 mapping excludes Unary from feature tracking as M2 core, so the residual surface is ledger-tracked; activation home M6-02 (elementwise math, which ports unary vector negation)

PROM-39 __type__/__unit__ metadata-label semantics (upstream experimental type-and-unit-labels feature): upstream drops the metadata labels on computed values the same way it drops __name__, PulsusDB treats them as ordinary labels and keeps them, so the actual series carries two extra labels; homed as the scheduled 'type-and-unit-labels' language feature — M6-08 evaluates-and-decides with these entries as input (issue #64 adjudication)

M2's metric-scoped model requires exactly one concrete metric name per selector (plan.rs::extract_name_and_matchers, docs/schemas.md section 2.1): matcher-only and regex-__name__ selectors are named-Unsupported by design; activation home M6-08 (selector completion alongside UTF-8 label names)

M2's metric-scoped model requires exactly one concrete metric name per selector (plan.rs::extract_name_and_matchers, docs/schemas.md section 2.1): matcher-only and regex-__name__ selectors are named-Unsupported by design; activation home M6-08 (selector completion alongside UTF-8 label names)

M2's metric-scoped model requires exactly one concrete metric name per selector (plan.rs::extract_name_and_matchers, docs/schemas.md section 2.1): matcher-only and regex-__name__ selectors are named-Unsupported by design; activation home M6-08 (selector completion alongside UTF-8 label names)

Expr::Unary over a vector/aggregate is named-Unsupported in M2 (plan.rs::plan_expr); the Delta-4 mapping excludes Unary from feature tracking as M2 core, so the residual surface is ledger-tracked; activation home M6-02 (elementwise math, which ports unary vector negation)
